---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
card-style: "summary"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/cynthiahqy
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/cynthiahqy
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/cynthiahqy
    - icon: envelope-at-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:cynthia.huang@monash.edu
---

🧙‍♀️ I am an interdisciplinary researcher with pronouns she/her. I work at the intersection of social data science, statistical programming and human-centered computing, with a particular focus on data quality, provenance and visualisation in data science workflows. Currently, I am a Postdoctoral Researcher in the [Social Data Science and AI Lab at LMU Munich](https://www.stat.lmu.de/soda/en/), working with [Frauke Kreuter](https://www.stat.lmu.de/soda/en/team/contact-page/frauke-kreuter-825909f7.html). I completed my PhD in the Department of Econometrics and Business Statistics at Monash University under the supervision of [Rob J Hyndman](https://robjhyndman.com), [Simon Angus](https://research.monash.edu/en/persons/simon-angus), and [Sarah Goodwin](https://research.monash.edu/en/persons/sarah-goodwin).

Check out my [now page](now.qmd) for semi-frequent updates on what I'm working on and thinking about. My favourite side hats at the moment are co-host of the [Random Sample](https://www.therandomsample.com.au/) podcast, and [Quarto](https://quarto.org) evangelist and tinkerer.


<!-- 🤹🏻This blog is a seed nursery for holding ideas, thoughts and projects I'm juggling while I build my [digital garden](https://maggieappleton.com/garden-history). Expect anything from machine learning, data wrangling, reproducible workflows, teaching pedagogy to half-formed opinions on social issues, personal data-viz, and winding journeys through my special interests of the moment. -->

<!-- ## Interviews and Profiles

About me, published by:

-   Australian Research Data Commons (May 2023): [Shaping Research Software: An Interview With Cynthia Huang](https://ardc.edu.au/article/shaping-research-software-an-interview-with-cynthia-huang/)
-   Monash Data Future Institute (Mar 2022): [Monash Data Futures Institute PhD Students](https://www.monash.edu/data-futures-institute/about-us/people/monash-data-futures-institute-phd-students) -->
